_doc:
Trade rules for the PlayGM kid-fantasy trade engine. Authoritative source for the fairness check, per-tier trade caps, and post-execution roster lock. The numerical grade ladder mirrors server/src/services/ratings/computeRatings.ts → GRADE_SCORE so a server change to the ladder requires a matching change here. PP-to-grade conversion converts PlayPoint sweeteners into a comparable scalar so a small PP top-up nudges the fairness scale without letting cash-rich kids buy lopsided trades.
v1.1.0 changes: caps switched from per-season to per-day (UTC-resetting) — see caps.by_tier.*.trades_per_day.

fairness._imbalance_pct_doc: Max allowed (|sideA - sideB| / max(sideA, sideB)) before the proposal is auto-rejected. 15% gives the engine breathing room for plausible value-add trades (e.g. 2 B+ for 1 A-) while killing obviously lopsided offers.
fairness._pp_doc: 200 PP == 1.0 grade-score points. So 100 PP == 0.5 grade points (matches the spec). Capped at max_pp_per_side so a kid with 100k PP can't bulldoze fairness with cash.
fairness._max_pp_doc: Hard ceiling on PP sweetener per side. 2000 PP == 10 grade-score points == one grade tier shift, which is plenty of nudge for a fairness adjustment without enabling pure-PP trades.
fairness._equal_counts_doc: When true, both sides of a trade must include the same number of players (1v1, 2v2, 3v3, 4v4). Asymmetric trades (e.g. 2 for 3) are rejected client + server side.

execution._lock_doc: After a trade executes, both rosters are locked from outbound trade proposals for 24h. Prevents arbitrage flipping (trade A→B, B→A loop).

caps._doc: Daily trade caps per tier. Counts a user's executed-trade rows for the current UTC day (00:00:00Z → 23:59:59Z window) and rejects new proposals once the cap is reached. -1 == unlimited. Resets at UTC midnight.

age_safety._doc: COPPA-aware: under-13 users can only trade with kids on their friend list. 13+ can trade with any opponent in the same league.

expiry._ttl_doc: Pending proposals expire 72h after creation if neither side accepts/rejects. Keeps the trades inbox from accumulating stale offers.

_cooldown_doc: After a proposal between two users (regardless of outcome), wait this many hours before another proposal between the same pair is allowed. 0 disables the cooldown.
